name: Health Industry Cybersecurity Practices: Managing Threats and Protecting Patients (HICP)
descr: Examines cybersecurity threats and vulnerabilities that affect the healthcare industry. It explores (5) current threats and presents (10) practices to mitigate those threats.

name: Technical Volume 1: Cybersecurity Practices for Small Health Care Organizations
descr: Discusses the ten Cybersecurity Practices along with Sub-Practices for small health care organizations.

name: Technical Volume 2: Cybersecurity Practices for Medium and Large Health Care Organizations
descr: Discusses the ten Cybersecurity Practices along with Sub-Practices for medium and large health care organizations.

name: Resources and Templates
descr: Includes a variety of cybersecurity resources and templates for end users to reference.

name: Cybersecurity Practices Assessments Toolkit (Appendix E-1)
descr: This tool helps organizations prioritize their cyber threats and develop their own action plans using the assessment methodology outlined in the Resources and Templates volume. For your awareness, this tool is still under development.
